message:
fix(watch): replace blocking Condvar with async waker-based notification (bd-3br6e)

watch::Receiver::changed() used Condvar::wait_timeout(10ms) which blocks
the calling OS thread. When called from async tasks on scheduler worker
threads, this causes throughput collapse or deadlock with small worker
pools.

Changed to waker-based notification:
- Receiver::changed() now returns ChangedFuture (implements Future)
- WatchInner stores Vec<Waker> instead of Condvar
- Sender::send/send_modify/drop wake all registered wakers
- WatchStream::poll_next properly polls the future and returns Pending
- Added tests for Pending→Ready transition and sender-drop wake

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
